design_philosophy: Functional-first dashboard with neutral surfaces and high-impact red accents for primary actions and data highlights.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards and containers to provide breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Grid layout. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.card_style: Flat solid surfaces with 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), rounded-xl, no heavy shadows. Use shadow-sm on hover.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense content and tables. Center-align empty states.

components_strategy.buttons: Shadcn buttons. Primary buttons use bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white. Use subtle rounded corners (rounded-md).
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn inputs and forms. Clean, 1px border. Focus ring should be ring-red-500/20 with border-red-500.
components_strategy.cards: Shadcn Card for Mitra boxes and summary widgets.
components_strategy.tables: Shadcn Table for transaction lists. Alternating row colors or simple clean borders.
components_strategy.charts: Recharts. Use LineChart or BarChart for sales. Use red (#DC2626) as the primary chart color, paired with neutral grays for secondary datasets.

login_page.layout: Two-column split screen on desktop. Left side: Login form (email + password). Right side: Immersive background image covering the full height.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation + Top Header + Main Content Area.
dashboard.header: Sticky header with page title, current date, and user profile.
dashboard.metrics_row: Top row showing total sales today, total profit, and total items sold.
dashboard.mitra_cards_section: Grid of cards. Each card represents one 'Mitra' (Partner). Includes Title (Mitra Name), list of products sold today, and totals.
dashboard.actions: Prominent 'Export PDF' and 'Cetak Struk' (Print Receipt) buttons near the relevant tables/charts.

new_item_form.layout: Use a Modal (Dialog) or a dedicated slide-out Panel (Sheet) for adding new items to keep the dashboard context.

daily_sales_input.layout: Inline editable table or a dedicated form layout to quickly input 'Jumlah Terjual' (Amount Sold) per product.

images.description: Traditional Indonesian breakfast Nasi Uduk/Ayam Penyet, used for the right-side panel of the login page.
Nasi Campur for empty states or generic food banners.
Minimalist red logo to be used in the top-left of the sidebar/header.

technical_instructions_for_main_agent: Use .js/.jsx extensions for React components. Do NOT use .tsx.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Initialize Tailwind config with the specified colors and fonts.
For the Mitra Cards, ensure there's enough padding (p-6) and display a clean list of products inside the card.
Calculate profit dynamically: (Harga Jual - Harga Dari Mitra) * Jumlah Terjual.
Implement the Export PDF and Print Receipt functionalities using window.print() or specialized JS libraries as appropriate (e.g., react-to-print or jsPDF).
Ensure the UI correctly formats Indonesian Rupiah (Rp X.XXX).
